events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes an air separator installed in the wrong location in a boiler & pump piping system on a commercial project. The work is at rough-complete stage.

An air separator in the wrong location is a non-compliant condition. Air separators need to be installed per manufacturer requirements and hydronic design principles - typically at the point of highest temperature and lowest pressure (usually near the boiler outlet). Wrong location means it won't function properly, trapping air incorrectly or not at all.

Decision: fail
Risk: medium (system won't function properly, could cause air binding, pump cavitation, reduced efficiency)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 85%
Confidence: high, 0.9
